channel.title: Sql on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Sql on Arrans github.io

item.title: pingcap/tidb
item.description: TiDB is an open-source, cloud-native, distributed, MySQL-Compatible database for elastic scale and real-time analytics. Try AI-powered Chat2Query free at : https://www.pingcap.com/tidb-serverless/

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: PRQL/prql
item.description: PRQL is a modern language for transforming data — a simple, powerful, pipelined SQL replacement

item.title: dolthub/go-mysql-server
item.description: A MySQL-compatible relational database with a storage agnostic query engine. Implemented in pure Go.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: osquery/osquery
item.description: SQL powered operating system instrumentation, monitoring, and analytics.

item.title: cloudquery/cloudquery
item.description: The open source high performance ELT framework powered by Apache Arrow

item.title: go-reform/reform
item.description: A better ORM for Go, based on non-empty interfaces and code generation.

item.title: codenotary/immudb
item.description: immudb - immutable database based on zero trust, SQL/Key-Value/Document model, tamperproof, data change history

item.title: mergestat/mergestat-lite
item.description: Query git repositories with SQL. Generate reports, perform status checks, analyze codebases. 🔍 📊
